pre_emit_critique: P5 H4 E5 S5 R5 V5
diversification_note: Second Hallmark run. Macrostructure shifts from shell+primitives to module-private CSS+JS cleanup. Anchor hue stable (warm-amber). Rotated ~60 var(--accent-*) usages to --color-{ok,warn,info,err}; deleted 23 dead .md-* selectors; added 9 tokens (--t-14, --t-16, --s-0-5, --r-3, --letter-caps, --letter-display, --xterm-bg, --xterm-fg, --xterm-cursor); migrated xterm theme to computed-style; extracted explore-workspace.js <style> block (150 lines) to style.css; fixed broken var(--bg) and var(--warning)/var(--danger) refs; renamed cross-module .ncl-overlay/.ncl-drawer to shared .drawer-overlay/.drawer; refactored GATE_COLORS (4 hex literals) to GATE_STATE_CLASS; swept 17 legacy aliases from tokens.css.
scope: all 8 module-private CSS sections + 8 js/components inline-style sweeps
modules_migrated: .tb-* trading-bot dashboard + GATE_COLORS refactor + 8 new gate state classes
.rsl-* + 168 inline JS styles swept to 6 utility classes + 3 broken var(--bg) fixed
.dk-* + xterm theme via computed style + 9 docker.js inline styles → 3 classes
dead_code_deleted: 23 .md-* selectors across 3 removed subsystems (search results, library table, duplicate player bar)
drawer_unification: .ncl-overlay/.nm-overlay/.dk-overlay shell consolidated into shared .drawer-overlay/.drawer; per-module .nm-drawer/.ncl-drawer/.dk-drawer/.rsl-drawer retained only for max-width
a11y_added: color-blind-safe ::before prefixes for 11 module status classes ([+]/[-]/[BUY]/[SELL]/[HOLD]/[OK]/[BLOCK]/[INFO]/[WARN]/[ERR]/[REF])
dead_letter_fixes: var(--accent-amber,#ffaa00) inline color in explore-workspace.js → nw-count-amber class
GATE_COLORS hex literals (#8866ff, #ff6688, #ff4466, #44ddaa) → GATE_STATE_CLASS semantic mapping
7 dead var(--token, #hex) fallbacks in .md-dl-* removed (alias resolves to real token)
next_run: extract progress-bar pattern (.tb-gate-fill / .md-dl-bar / .dk-pull-bar) into unified .progress-bar component with --progress-pct CSS variable

pre_emit_critique: P5 H4 E5 S5 R5 V5
diversification_note: First Hallmark run on this project. Rotated anchor hue from green-phosphor (#00ff88) to warm-amber (oklch 78% 0.16 75) per Hallmark diversification rule — same terminal DNA preserved, accent hue changed. Mono-only font policy retained. Dark-only color-scheme enforced.
scope: shell+primitives only — sidebar, topbar, panels, buttons, tables, forms, modals, toasts, global player. Per-module accent classes (.dk-*, .bt-*, .nm-*, .nc-*, .md-*, .tb-*, .rsl-*, .ns-*) deferred to a follow-up pass.
a11y_added: prefers-reduced-motion: collapse to 150ms opacity, disable status pulse, instant drawers
color-blind-safe status pairs (symbol + color, never color alone)
next_run: module-accent rotation: .dk-*, .bt-*, .nm-*, .nc-*, .md-*, .tb-*, .rsl-*, .ns-* classes — replace inline rgba(0,255,136,0.08) green washes with --color-{ok,warn,info,accent}-soft tokens
